tools.name: Clone Form
tools.description: Tool to clone a single form in Jotform. Creates a complete copy of the form with all its questions and settings. Use when you need to dupli…

tools.name: Create Label
tools.description: Tool to create a new label for organizing forms in Jotform. Use when you need to categorize or group forms with a named label.

tools.name: Delete Label
tools.description: Tool to delete a label along with all its sublabels. Use when you need to remove a label from the account.

tools.name: Get Label
tools.description: Tool to retrieve details of a label by its ID, including name and color. Use when you need to fetch information about a specific label.

tools.name: Get Label Resources
tools.description: Tool to get a list of assets (forms) in a label and their associated information. Use when you need to retrieve forms organized under a spe…

tools.name: Get System Plan
tools.description: Tool to retrieve details of a specific system plan. Use when you need to check limits and pricing of a plan.

tools.name: Get User Details
tools.description: Tool to retrieve details of the authenticated user, including account and usage info. Use after confirming valid API key.

tools.name: Get User Folders
tools.description: Tool to retrieve a list of labels (folders replacement) for the authenticated user. Uses the GET /user/labels endpoint per Jotform's migrat…

tools.name: Get User Forms
tools.description: Tool to retrieve a list of forms created by the authenticated user. Use after setting up API key authentication.

tools.name: Get User History
tools.description: Tool to fetch user activity history records. Use when auditing or filtering user actions by type or date.

tools.name: Get User Reports
tools.description: Tool to retrieve list of report URLs for all forms in the account. Includes Excel, CSV, printable charts, and embeddable HTML tables.

tools.name: Get User Settings
tools.description: Tool to retrieve the settings of the authenticated user. Use after confirming a valid API key.

tools.name: Get User Setting By Key
tools.description: Tool to retrieve a specific user setting by key. Use when you need a single setting value like email, timezone, language, or website.

tools.name: Get User Submissions
tools.description: Tool to retrieve all submissions for all forms on the account. The answers dictionary contains submission data with question IDs as keys. U…

tools.name: Get User Usage
tools.description: Tool to retrieve monthly usage statistics for the authenticated user. Use to check form submissions, payment forms, SSL submissions, and st…

tools.name: Remove Resources from Label
tools.description: Tool to remove specified resources (forms) from a label by their IDs and types. Use when you need to unassign forms from a specific label.

tools.name: Update Label
tools.description: Tool to update an existing label with new name or color settings. Use when you need to modify label properties.

tools.name: Update User Settings
tools.description: Tool to update user's settings like time zone, language, email, and website. Use when you need to modify user account settings.
